prompt: Invent an original, vivid metaphor for the experience of learning a new language as an adult. Explain it in three sentences.
response: Learning a new language as an adult is like planting a garden in a foreign land. It requires careful research on the appropriate tools and techniques, as well as patience and dedication to nurture the seeds of vocabulary and grammar. Just as a garden requires tending and maintenance, so too does language learning – constant practice and care are necessary to ensure a thriving, flourishing language proficiency.
